name: Rozay Golf
about: Rozay Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Sandy, Utah, featuring private bays equipped with Full Swing Pro simulator 2.0 technology. The facility offers a multi-use environment combining golf simulation with a fitness center, indoor putting and chipping green, and a coffee bar with drinks and snacks. Memberships provide 24/7 access to the simulators, with options for both golf play and work from private bays. The venue is designed as a lifestyle club that integrates golf with social and fitness amenities.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to elite golf simulators in private bays
Partnership with Full Swing for top-tier simulator technology
Integrated fitness center and short game practice area
Members can bring guests and food for a personalized experience

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring food into their bays; trash bins are provided outside the club
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not explicitly mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Used in all private bays; described as top-rated technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice for golf simulator venues that players bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are allowed to bring food into their bays. Drinks like sodas and water are already provided.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is designed to be family-friendly and allows members to bring guests, making it suitable for family outings.
